# Matt "Forni" Fornaciari

> Personal site of Matthew "Forni" Fornaciari: engineer in Denver, Colorado. Co-founder and CTO of Gremlin (est. 2016), where chaos engineering became a discipline. Earlier: Amazon and Salesforce. Later: climate technology at QuitCarbon and Zero Homes. Today he consults through Reliably Yours and writes essays at Atelic Action. Brown University, applied mathematics and computer science.

Ethos: been there before, happy to help. Reliability is how he builds; altruism is why.

## Pages

- [Home](https://home.mattforni.com/): who Forni is, in brief
- [Story](https://home.mattforni.com/story): the career narrative from Brown through Gremlin and climate tech to Reliably Yours
- [Writing](https://home.mattforni.com/writing): essays, with the archive at his Substack

## Elsewhere

- [Atelic Action (Substack)](https://forni.substack.com): essays on doing things that are not for anything
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/mattforni/)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/mattforni)
- [goodbye("Gremlin") // Hello world (Medium)](https://medium.com/@callmeforni/goodbye-gremlin-hello-world-b119abd3d370): his farewell essay after six years building Gremlin

## Contact

- Email: mattforni@gmail.com
